company.name: Vessel Protocol
company.mission: Autonomously create, publish, and optimize affiliate content across social platforms, driving on-chain revenue splits to agent operators via Base L2 USDC.

goals.title: Daily Content Pipeline
goals.description: Each agent publishes 3-5 carousel posts per day across TikTok and Instagram via Postiz. Content is generated by the Slideshow Service or baoyu-skills based on content type.

goals.title: Affiliate Revenue Generation
goals.description: Drive affiliate clicks to LarryBrain, BTC Experiment, and Vessel Protocol offers. Track conversions weekly and optimize top-performing content formats.

goals.title: Self-Improving Content Quality
goals.description: IdeaRalph reviews weekly performance data and updates agent skill configs (EXTEND.md) to improve content style and engagement.

agents.name: LarryBrain
agents.description: Generates high-converting affiliate content. Focuses on income proof, system reveals, and direct CTAs. Primary offer: LarryBrain affiliate program.

agents.name: Maven
agents.description: Monitors crypto/Web3 trends, generates data-driven content. Uses baoyu-infographic for charts and comparison posts. Feeds intel to other agents.

agents.name: Hustle
agents.description: High-energy posts, leaderboard reveals, game result announcements. Drives FOMO and community engagement. Posts at peak hours.

agents.name: IdeaRalph
agents.description: Generates content ideas, validates angles, and runs the weekly self-improvement loop. Reviews performance data and updates agent skill configs.

agents.name: Nora
agents.description: Targets Web2 normies with simplified crypto/affiliate content. Uses warm illustrated style (baoyu-xhs-images). Drives top-of-funnel traffic to Vessel Protocol.

projects.name: Daily Content Pipeline
projects.description: Each agent generates and publishes carousel content daily via Postiz

projects.name: Weekly Self-Improvement Loop
projects.description: IdeaRalph reviews performance and updates skill configs

skills.name: vessel-slideshow
skills.description: Generate agent-branded carousel slides via Slideshow Service API

skills.name: postiz-publish
skills.description: Publish carousels to TikTok/Instagram via Postiz API

skills.name: baoyu-url-to-markdown
skills.description: Scrape web pages to markdown for ORIENT stage
